response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the minimum bar — a CS degree from ETH Zürich and roughly 19 years of hands-on software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems — and brings genuine entrepreneurial experience as founder of an open-source geo-data platform. However, this is a Director-level AI strategy role, and the profile is that of a strong senior/staff product engineer: his AI exposure (MCP code generators, agentic tooling) is only about a year old and infrastructure-adjacent, with no advanced AI degree, no recognized AI expertise, no shipped AI products or platforms, and no evidence of the strategic advisory or organization-level influence the role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad, hands-on engineering experience spanning web, embedded, mobile, and low-latency high-throughput systems
Founder-level entrepreneurial experience building and sustaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise, advanced AI degree, or demonstrated AI products/platforms at meaningful scale
Career trajectory is senior/staff individual contributor with no director-level scope, strategy ownership, or customer advisory experience
AI experience is recent (~1 year) and tooling-focused rather than the deep cloud/AI platform strategy the role centers on

key_factors.factor: Breadth and length of engineering experience
